recipes.title: Gujarati Dal
recipes.description: A simple, flavorful Jain dal without onion or garlic.
recipes.ingredients: Toor dal, turmeric, ginger, green chili, cumin seeds, curry leaves, salt, jaggery, lemon juice.
recipes.steps: 1. Cook dal with turmeric and water. 2. Fry cumin, ginger, chili and curry leaves. 3. Add to dal, simmer, finish with jaggery and lemon juice.

recipes.title: Fasting Sabudana Khichdi
recipes.description: Comforting Jain fasting khichdi made with sabudana and peanuts.
recipes.ingredients: Sabudana, peanuts, potatoes, cumin seeds, green chili, rock salt, ghee, coriander.
recipes.steps: 1. Soak sabudana. 2. Roast peanuts. 3. Cook potatoes with spices, add sabudana, finish with coriander.

recipes.title: Jain Vegetable Pulao
recipes.description: A fragrant pulao with peas, carrots, and mild spices that follows Jain cooking rules.
recipes.ingredients: Basmati rice, peas, carrots, potatoes, ghee, cumin, cinnamon, cloves, green cardamom, salt.
recipes.steps: 1. Wash rice and soak. 2. Fry whole spices in ghee, add vegetables. 3. Add rice and water, cook until fluffy.

recipes.title: Sabudana Vada
recipes.description: Crispy sabudana patties perfect for Jain fasting days.
recipes.ingredients: Sabudana, mashed potatoes, peanuts, green chili, cumin seeds, rock salt, coriander, oil.
recipes.steps: 1. Soak sabudana and combine with mashed potato, peanuts and spices. 2. Shape patties. 3. Deep fry until golden brown.

recipes.title: Mango Shrikhand
recipes.description: A creamy Jain dessert made with strained yogurt and fresh mango.
recipes.ingredients: Hung curd, mango pulp, sugar, cardamom powder, saffron, chopped pistachios.
recipes.steps: 1. Strain curd until thick. 2. Beat with sugar and mango pulp. 3. Chill and garnish with pistachios.
